vocabularies.definition: The number 1.
vocabularies.example:
I have one apple.
There is one book.
One and one is two.
quizzes: I have __________ red apple in my small school bag today.
Look! There is __________ big brown book on the wooden table.
__________ and one is two. Can you count with me?

vocabularies.definition: The number 2.
vocabularies.example:
I have two hands.
Two eyes and two ears.
There are two cats.
quizzes: I have __________ hands. I can clap my hands and wave hello!
I have __________ eyes and two ears on my happy face today.
There are __________ small black cats sleeping on the soft sofa.

vocabularies.definition: The number 3.
vocabularies.example:
The three little pigs.
Three birds are flying.
I have three pencils.
quizzes: I can see __________ little pigs playing in the green garden today.
Look at the sky! __________ beautiful birds are flying high.
I have __________ pencils in my hand. One is red and two are blue.

vocabularies.definition: The number 4.
vocabularies.example:
A car has four wheels.
Four seasons in a year.
I have four books.
quizzes: A fast silver car has __________ wheels. Let's count them: 1, 2, 3, 4!
There are __________ seasons in a year: spring, summer, autumn, and winter.
I have __________ books about animals on my wooden bookcase today.

vocabularies.definition: The number 5.
vocabularies.example:
High five!
I have five fingers.
Five ducks in a pond.
quizzes: Give me a high __________! You are doing a very good job today.
I have __________ fingers on my right hand. Can you see them?
I can see __________ little yellow ducks swimming in the blue pond.

vocabularies.definition: The number 6.
vocabularies.example:
A ladybug has six legs.
I am six years old.
Six eggs in the box.
quizzes: A small red ladybug has __________ legs. It is very tiny and cute.
I am __________ years old today! Happy birthday to me!
There are __________ white eggs in the kitchen box. Let's make a cake!

vocabularies.definition: The number 7.
vocabularies.example:
Seven days in a week.
The seven dwarfs.
I have seven apples.
quizzes: There are __________ days in a week. Monday is the first day.
Do you know the story of Snow White and the __________ dwarfs?
I have __________ sweet red apples in my big basket today.

vocabularies.definition: The number 8.
vocabularies.example:
An octopus has eight legs.
eight o'clock.
I have eight pencils.
quizzes: A big octopus lives in the sea and it has __________ long legs.
It is __________ o'clock in the morning. It is time for school!
I have __________ colorful pencils. My favorite one is purple.

vocabularies.definition: The number 9.
vocabularies.example:
Nine comes after eight.
I have nine toy cars.
Nine birds on the tree.
quizzes: The number __________ comes after eight. Let's count: 7, 8, 9!
I have __________ toy cars. Some are red and some are blue.
I can see __________ birds sitting on the branches of the tall tree.

vocabularies.definition: The number 10.
vocabularies.example:
I have ten fingers.
Ten little Indians.
Ten toes on my feet.
quizzes: I have __________ fingers on my hands. I use them to play and draw.
Let's sing a song about __________ little monkeys jumping on the bed.
I have __________ toes on my feet. I can wiggle them today!

vocabularies.definition: The number 11.
vocabularies.example:
I am eleven years old.
There are eleven apples.
Eleven comes after ten.
quizzes: My big cousin is __________ years old. He goes to a big school.
There are __________ red apples in the shop. They look very sweet.
The number __________ comes after ten. Can you write it?

vocabularies.definition: The number 12.
vocabularies.example:
Twelve months in a year.
Twelve eggs make a dozen.
It is twelve o'clock.
quizzes: There are __________ months in a year. January is the first month.
__________ eggs make a dozen. Let's buy some eggs at the market.
It is __________ o'clock. It is time to eat my delicious lunch!

vocabularies.definition: The color of an apple or a tomato.
vocabularies.example:
An apple is red.
A red bus.
I like the color red.
quizzes: I have a big __________ apple. It is very sweet and crunchy.
Look at that big __________ bus! It is coming to take us to school.
I like the color __________! It is the same color as my favorite toy car.

vocabularies.definition: The color of the sky or the sea.
vocabularies.example:
The sky is blue.
Blue sea.
I have a blue pen.
quizzes: The sky is __________ today. The sun is shining and it is very beautiful.
I can see the big __________ sea from the window of our fast silver car.
I have a __________ pen in my school bag. I use it to write my name.

vocabularies.definition: The color of grass or leaves.
vocabularies.example:
Grass is green.
A green leaf.
I like green grapes.
quizzes: The grass in our garden is __________. I like to play on it with my friends.
Look! A small __________ leaf is falling from the tall tree today.
I like __________ grapes for my snack. They are very delicious and sweet.

vocabularies.definition: The color of a lemon or the sun.
vocabularies.example:
A yellow sun.
Yellow bananas.
I have a yellow shirt.
quizzes: The __________ sun is shining high in the blue sky. It makes me feel warm.
I have two __________ bananas for my lunch today. They are very yellow!
I am wearing my favorite __________ shirt today. It has a happy face on it.

vocabularies.definition: A color between red and yellow; also a fruit.
vocabularies.example:
An orange is orange.
Orange juice.
A bright orange fish.
quizzes: An __________ is orange! It is a round fruit that smells very good.
I like to drink __________ juice for breakfast. It is very cold and sweet.
I saw a bright __________ fish swimming in the water at the park today.

vocabularies.definition: A pale red color, like many flowers.
vocabularies.example:
A pink flower.
Pink cheeks.
I have a pink dress.
quizzes: Look at that beautiful __________ flower! It smells very nice and sweet.
My little sister has __________ cheeks because she is very happy today.
I have a new __________ dress. I want to wear it to the birthday party tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A color between red and blue.
vocabularies.example:
I have a purple ball.
My favorite color is purple.
Look at that purple flower.
quizzes: I have a big __________ ball. I like to throw it to my best friend lily.
My favorite color is __________! What is your favorite color today?
Look at that __________ flower in the garden. It is a very pretty color.

vocabularies.definition: The color of earth or chocolate.
vocabularies.example:
A brown bear.
Brown eyes.
I have a brown bag.
quizzes: I saw a big __________ bear in my story book. It was very big and strong.
He has __________ eyes and black hair. He looks very friendly and kind.
I have a small __________ bag to keep all my favorite toys and silver coins.

vocabularies.definition: The color of coal or the night sky.
vocabularies.example:
A black cat.
Black shoes.
The night is black.
quizzes: My neighbor has a small __________ cat. It likes to sleep on the soft sofa.
I have new __________ shoes for school. They are very shiny and clean.
The night sky is __________ tonight. I can see many bright yellow stars.

vocabularies.definition: The color of milk or snow.
vocabularies.example:
White snow.
A white rabbit.
Milk is white.
quizzes: The __________ snow is falling from the sky. It is very cold and very white.
I saw a small __________ rabbit hopping in the long green grass today.
Milk is __________! It is very good for your health and makes you strong.

grammars.description: Hỏi về số lượng.
grammars.example:
How many apples? 
Two apples.

grammars.description: Hỏi về màu sắc.
grammars.example:
What color is the car? 
It is red.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your body that has your eyes, ears, nose, and mouth.
vocabularies.example:
Touch your head.
Move your head.
I have one head.
quizzes: Touch your __________ and say hello! My head is at the top of my body.
I can move my __________ from side to side. Can you do it too today?
I have one __________ and two ears on my body. It is very special today.

vocabularies.definition: The thin things that grow on your head.
vocabularies.example:
She has long hair.
My hair is black.
Wash your hair.
quizzes: She has long __________ that reaches all the way down to her waist today.
My __________ is black and very soft. I like to brush it every morning today.
Please wash your __________ with some nice soap! It will be very clean today.

vocabularies.definition: The front part of your head with your eyes, nose, and mouth.
vocabularies.example:
Wash your face.
A happy face.
A beautiful face.
quizzes: Wash your __________ with some cold water! It will make you feel very fresh.
Look at my happy __________! I am smiling because I am playing in the park.
She has a beautiful __________ and long curly hair. She is very pretty today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your face that you see with.
vocabularies.example:
Close your eyes.
I have blue eyes.
Open your eyes.
quizzes: Close your __________ and try to sleep! It is time for a rest in your bed tonight.
I have two big blue __________ on my face. I use them to see everything today.
Open your __________ wide! Look at the beautiful colorful birds in the tree today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your head that you hear with.
vocabularies.example:
Listen with your ears.
I have two ears.
A rabbit has long ears.
quizzes: Please listen with your __________ to the beautiful song about a brave knight today.
I have two __________ on my head. I can hear the birds singing in the garden.
A small white rabbit has __________ ears that can move up and down today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your face that you smell with.
vocabularies.example:
I smell with my nose.
Touch your nose.
A big nose.
quizzes: I smell the beautiful pink flower with my __________. It smells very sweet today.
Touch your __________ and make a funny sound! Can you do it with your friends?
The big grey elephant has a very long __________ that we call a trunk today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your face that you eat and speak with.
vocabularies.example:
Open your mouth.
I eat with my mouth.
A fish has a small mouth.
quizzes: Open your __________ and say 'Ah'! The doctor wants to see your teeth today.
I eat delicious sweet chocolate cake with my __________. It tastes very good.
A small silver fish has a very small __________ to eat tiny pieces of food today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your body where your arm joins your neck.
vocabularies.example:
Touch your shoulders.
My bag is on my shoulder.
I have two shoulders.
quizzes: Touch your __________ with your hands! 1, 2, 3... let's do it together today.
My school bag is very heavy on my __________. It is full of my English books.
I have two __________ at the top of my arms. I can move them up and down.

vocabularies.definition: The long part of your body between your shoulder and your hand.
vocabularies.example:
Wave your arms.
I have two arms.
Long arms.
quizzes: Wave your __________ and say goodbye to your friends! I will see you tomorrow.
I have two __________ and two hands. I can hug my mother and father today.
The funny monkey has very long __________ to climb the tall green trees today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your body at the end of your arm with fingers.
vocabularies.example:
Wash your hands.
Clap your hands.
I have two hands.
quizzes: Please wash your __________ with some soap before you eat your delicious lunch today.
Clap your __________ if you are happy! Let's sing and dance together today.
I have two __________ and ten fingers. I use them to draw and play with toys.

vocabularies.definition: One of the five long parts on your hand.
vocabularies.example:
Point with your finger.
Ten fingers.
I have a ring on my finger.
quizzes: Point with your __________ to the big yellow sun in the blue sky! It is very bright.
I have ten __________ on my two hands. Can you count them with me today?
I have a shiny silver ring on my __________. It was a present for my birthday.

vocabularies.definition: The long part of your body that you use for standing and walking.
vocabularies.example:
I run with my legs.
Long legs.
I have two legs.
quizzes: I run and jump with my __________. I like to play football in the green park.
The big giraffe has very long __________ and a very long neck to reach the trees.
I have two __________ and two feet. I can walk to school with my big brother today.

vocabularies.definition: The part of your body at the end of your leg that you stand on.
vocabularies.example:
Put your foot in the shoe.
Left foot.
Kick with your foot.
quizzes: Put your __________ in the shoe! It is time to go to the park and play today.
This is my left __________ and this is my right foot. I can wiggle my toes.
I can kick the round ball with my __________! Watch me play football tonight.

vocabularies.definition: One of the five small parts on your foot.
vocabularies.example:
Ten toes.
Wiggle your toes.
Touch your toes.
quizzes: I have ten __________ on my two feet. Can you count them: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5...
Wiggle your __________ inside your socks! It feels very funny and makes me laugh.
Touch your __________ with your hands! Can you reach them today? You are very good.

grammars.description: Giới thiệu bộ phận cơ thể.
grammars.example:
This is my nose.
These are my eyes.

vocabularies.definition: A group of people who are related to each other, like a mother and father.
vocabularies.example:
I love my family.
A big family.
Family is important.
quizzes: I love my __________ very much! We like to eat dinner together every night today.
We have a big __________; I have three brothers and four sisters in my house tonight.
My __________ is very important to me. We play games in the green garden today.

vocabularies.definition: A female parent.
vocabularies.example:
My mother is beautiful.
I help my mother.
She is a kind mother.
quizzes: My __________ is very beautiful. She has long curly hair and a happy smile tonight.
I help my __________ to clean the kitchen and wash the red apples for lunch today.
She is a very kind __________; she reads me a long story before I go to sleep today.

vocabularies.definition: A male parent.
vocabularies.example:
My father is tall.
I play with my father.
He is a great father.
quizzes: My __________ is very tall. He can reach the top of the big wooden bookcase today.
I play football with my __________ in the large green park every Saturday afternoon.
He is a great __________! He helps me with my English homework every evening tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A girl or woman who has the same parents as you.
vocabularies.example:
I have two sisters.
My sister is young.
I play with my sister.
quizzes: I have two __________; their names are Lily and May. We play with our toys today.
My __________ is very young. She is only three years old and she is very cute today.
I play hide and seek with my __________ in our big house. It is very fun tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A boy or man who has the same parents as you.
vocabularies.example:
My brother is big.
I have one brother.
He is my little brother.
quizzes: My __________ is big. He goes to school in the big city with his best friends today.
I have one __________; he is ten years old and he likes to play computer games today.
He is my little __________; I help him to find his favorite small blue toy car today.

vocabularies.definition: The mother of your mother or father.
vocabularies.example:
I love my grandmother.
My grandmother is kind.
She is my father's mother.
quizzes: I love my __________! She makes the most delicious sweet chocolate cake for me tonight.
My __________ is very kind. She tells me interesting stories about a brave monster.
She is my father's __________; she lives in a small pink house near the blue sea today.

vocabularies.definition: The father of your mother or father.
vocabularies.example:
My grandfather is old.
He tells stories.
I visit my grandfather.
quizzes: My __________ is old, but he is very strong. He walks to the busy market every day.
He tells me very long __________ about space and the bright yellow stars every night.
I visit my __________ every Saturday. We play board games in his quiet living room.

vocabularies.definition: A very young child.
vocabularies.example:
The baby is sleeping.
A cute baby.
I love the baby.
quizzes: The __________ is sleeping in the soft warm bed. Please be very quiet in the room.
My mother has a cute __________! It has very small hands and ten tiny little toes today.
I love the __________ very much; I like to hold its hand and sing a sweet song tonight.

vocabularies.definition: The child of your aunt or uncle.
vocabularies.example:
I play with my cousin.
He is my cousin.
My cousin lives in a big house.
quizzes: I play with my __________ in the park. We run very fast and fly our colorful kites today.
He is my __________; his father is my father's big brother. He is a very kind boy today.
My __________ lives in a big house with a large green garden and many beautiful flowers.

grammars.description: Hỏi về danh tính.
grammars.example:
Who is this? 
This is my brother.

vocabularies.definition: A small animal with soft fur and a long tail that people keep as a pet.
vocabularies.example:
The cat is on the mat.
I have a black cat.
The cat says meow.
quizzes: The little __________ is sleeping on the soft mat in the living room today.
I have a small black __________ with very soft fur and long whiskers tonight.
The __________ is very hungry; it says meow and wants some delicious milk today.

vocabularies.definition: An animal that people keep as a pet or for work, often called man's best friend.
vocabularies.example:
I have a big dog.
The dog is brown.
The dog says woof.
quizzes: I have a big __________; he likes to run and play with a round ball in the park.
The __________ is brown and has a very long tail. He is a very friendly pet.
Listen! The __________ says woof! He is very happy to see us at the door today.

vocabularies.definition: An animal that has feathers and wings and can usually fly.
vocabularies.example:
The bird is in the tree.
A beautiful blue bird.
Birds can fly.
quizzes: The little __________ is sitting on the branch of the tall green tree today.
I saw a beautiful blue __________ with long wings in the garden this morning.
Small __________ can fly high in the blue sky. They sing very sweet songs tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A small animal with long ears and a short tail.
vocabularies.example:
A small white rabbit.
The rabbit likes carrots.
The rabbit is hopping.
quizzes: I saw a small white __________ with long ears hopping in the green grass tonight.
The __________ is very hungry; it likes to eat fresh orange carrots today.
Look at the __________! It is hopping very fast around the big wooden box today.

vocabularies.definition: A very small animal with a long tail and small ears.
vocabularies.example:
A little grey mouse.
The mouse likes cheese.
A mouse has a long tail.
quizzes: A little grey __________ is hiding behind the big wooden bookcase in the room.
The __________ is very small; it likes to eat little pieces of yellow cheese today.
A __________ has very small ears and a very long tail. It is a tiny animal tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A young or baby cat.
vocabularies.example:
A cute kitten.
The kitten is playing.
I have a small kitten.
quizzes: Look at that cute __________! It is a tiny baby cat with very soft black fur.
The little __________ is playing with a colorful ball of wool on the floor tonight.
I have a small __________ in my house; it likes to drink milk and sleep on my bed.

vocabularies.definition: A young or baby dog.
vocabularies.example:
A playful puppy.
The puppy is brown.
I love my puppy.
quizzes: My baby dog is a playful __________; he likes to jump and wave his tail today.
The __________ is brown and very small. He likes to play in the green garden.
I love my __________ very much! He is my best friend and we play every day tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A small animal with short ears and no tail, often kept as a pet.
vocabularies.example:
I have a guinea pig.
A small guinea pig.
My guinea pig is soft.
quizzes: I have a __________; it is a small animal that likes to eat green grass today.
A small __________ is sitting in its box. It has very short ears and no tail.
My __________ is very soft and cute. I like to hold it in my hands tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A small animal like a mouse with no tail that keeps food in its cheeks.
vocabularies.example:
A little hamster.
The hamster is in its cage.
I have a hamster.
quizzes: I have a little __________; it looks like a small mouse but it has no tail tonight.
The __________ is in its small wooden cage. It is sleeping on some soft paper.
I have a __________ in my room; it likes to run in its round wheel every night.

vocabularies.definition: A small orange or red fish that people keep in a bowl or tank.
vocabularies.example:
A shiny goldfish.
The goldfish swims in the bowl.
I have a goldfish.
quizzes: I have a shiny orange __________; it lives in a large glass bowl in the kitchen.
The __________ swims around and around in the bowl of clear blue water tonight.
I have a __________ in my house. It is a small fish and it is a very quiet pet.

grammars.description: Sở hữu vật nuôi.
grammars.example:
I have got a cat.
She has got a rabbit.

vocabularies.definition: A large farm animal that is kept for its milk or meat.
vocabularies.example:
The cow is big.
A cow gives milk.
The cow says moo.
quizzes: The __________ is a very big farm animal. It likes to eat long green grass today.
A black and white __________ gives us fresh white milk to drink for breakfast.
Listen! The __________ says moo! It lives in the large field on the farm tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A large animal that people ride or use for pulling heavy things.
vocabularies.example:
I can ride a horse.
A brown horse.
A fast horse.
quizzes: I can ride a big __________! It is very tall and it can run very fast today.
Look at that beautiful brown __________ with the long tail in the green field tonight.
A fast __________ can jump over the wooden fence. It is a very strong animal.

vocabularies.definition: A common water bird with a flat beak and short legs.
vocabularies.example:
The duck swims in the pond.
A yellow duck.
The duck says quack.
quizzes: The little __________ swims in the blue pond. It has orange feet and a flat beak.
I saw a small yellow __________ with its mother. They are swimming together today.
The __________ says quack, quack! It is very happy to find some food in the water.

vocabularies.definition: A common farm bird that is kept for its eggs or meat.
vocabularies.example:
A chicken has feathers.
Chickens lay eggs.
A little chicken.
quizzes: A __________ has many soft feathers. It lives in a small house on the farm tonight.
Our brown __________ lay many white eggs for us to eat every morning today.
Look at the little __________! It is follows its mother around the farm yard today.

vocabularies.definition: A farm animal with thick wool that is kept for its wool or meat.
vocabularies.example:
A white sheep.
Sheep eat grass.
A soft sheep.
quizzes: I saw a fluffy white __________ in the field today. It looks like a soft cloud.
The __________ eat green grass on the hill. They have very thick white wool tonight.
A soft __________ says baa, baa! Is is very gentle and it likes to be with its friends.

vocabularies.definition: A pink or black farm animal with a flat nose and a short curly tail.
vocabularies.example:
A pink pig.
The pig lives on the farm.
A big pig.
quizzes: A little pink __________ is playing in the brown mud. It is very happy and dirty today.
The __________ lives on the farm in a small house. It says oink, oink tonight.
I saw a very big __________ with a short curly tail. It is eating its lunch now.

vocabularies.definition: An animal with horns that lives on farms or in the mountains.
vocabularies.example:
A goat has horns.
The goat eats grass.
A small goat.
quizzes: A __________ has two horns on its head. It can climb up the big grey rocks today.
The __________ eats green grass and leaves from the trees in the garden tonight.
I saw a small __________ with its mother. It is jumping and playing in the field.

vocabularies.definition: An animal like a small horse with long ears.
vocabularies.example:
A grey donkey.
The donkey is strong.
A donkey says eeyore.
quizzes: A grey __________ has very long ears and a short tail. It looks like a small horse.
The __________ is very strong; it can carry heavy bags on its back for the farmer today.
A __________ says eeyore! It is a very loud sound in the quiet farm yard tonight.

grammars.description: Tiếng kêu của động vật.
grammars.example:
The cow says moo.
The duck says quack.

vocabularies.definition: A large wild cat that lives in Africa and has a mane.
vocabularies.example:
The lion is the king.
A big lion.
A lion is strong.
quizzes: The __________ is the king of the animals. It has a big golden mane tonight.
I saw a very big __________ at the zoo. It looks very strong and brave today.
A __________ can roar very loudly! It is a big wild cat that lives in Africa today.

vocabularies.definition: A large wild cat with orange and black stripes.
vocabularies.example:
A tiger has stripes.
The tiger is fast.
A big tiger.
quizzes: A __________ has orange and black stripes. It is a very beautiful big cat tonight.
The __________ can run very fast in the long green grass. It is a good hunter today.
I saw a big __________ at the zoo. It has very sharp teeth and a long tail tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A very large grey animal with a long trunk and big ears.
vocabularies.example:
An elephant is big.
An elephant has a trunk.
A grey elephant.
quizzes: An __________ is the biggest land animal. It has very big ears and a long trunk today.
The big grey __________ uses its long trunk to drink water from the river tonight.
I saw a grey __________ with two white tusks. It is a very gentle and kind animal.

vocabularies.definition: An animal with a long tail that lives in trees.
vocabularies.example:
A monkey likes bananas.
The monkey is funny.
A monkey can climb.
quizzes: A __________ is very funny! It likes to eat sweet yellow bananas in the trees today.
The __________ is jumping from branch to branch in the tall green trees tonight.
A __________ has a long tail and can climb very well. It likes to play all day today.

vocabularies.definition: A very tall African animal with a long neck and spots.
vocabularies.example:
A giraffe is tall.
A giraffe has a long neck.
A yellow giraffe.
quizzes: A __________ is very tall. It has a very long neck to reach the green leaves today.
The orange and brown __________ has many spots on its body. It is a very tall animal.
I saw a yellow __________ at the zoo. It is the tallest animal in the world tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A large, heavy African animal that lives in or near rivers.
vocabularies.example:
A big hippo.
The hippo lives in the water.

vocabularies.example:
A fast motorbike.
Ride a motorbike.
A blue motorbike.
quizzes: My father has a very fast blue __________! He wears a black helmet and a warm jacket.
I want to ride a __________ when I am big and tall! It moves very fast on the long road.
Look at that shiny blue __________! It makes a very loud sound when it goes past our house.

vocabularies.definition: A vehicle used for traveling on water.
vocabularies.example:
A boat on the sea.
Row a boat.
A small boat.
quizzes: Look at that small white __________ on the blue sea! It is moving on the warm water today.
Let's row a __________ in the lake! We can use the wooden oars and see the green trees.
I have a toy __________ for my bath! It is very red and it floats on the warm soapy water.

vocabularies.definition: A large boat for traveling across the sea.
vocabularies.example:
A big ship.
A ship on the ocean.
Watch the ship.
quizzes: Look at that very big __________ on the blue ocean! It is carrying many large containers today.
A __________ can travel for a long time across the sea. It is very big and very strong tonight.
Let's watch the __________ go into the harbor! It is very tall and it has many people on it.

vocabularies.definition: A large vehicle for carrying heavy things.
vocabularies.example:
A big truck.
A red truck.
A truck carries things.
quizzes: Look at that big green __________! It has many wheels and it is very long on the road today.
I have a toy red __________ in my box! I can put many small toys in the back and drive it.
A __________ carries heavy things to the shops! It is very strong and it has a big engine.

vocabularies.definition: A vehicle that flies and has large blades on top that turn.
vocabularies.example:
A helicopter in the sky.
A noisy helicopter.
Watch the helicopter.
quizzes: Look at that __________ in the blue sky! It has big blades on top that go round and round.
A noisy __________ is flying over our house! It makes a very loud sound today tonight.
Let's watch the __________ land in the field! It is very cool and it can go up and down fast.

vocabularies.definition: A vehicle that is used for carrying things or groups of people.
vocabularies.example:
A white van.
A delivery van.
A big van.
quizzes: Look at that white __________! It is carrying many boxes to the shop near our big school today.
A delivery __________ is at our door! It has a new package for my mother and father today.
This is a big __________! It can carry many people or many heavy things in the back tonight.

grammars.description: Hỏi về phương tiện di chuyển.
grammars.example:
How do you go to school? By bus.
How do you go to the park? By bike.

vocabularies.definition: A public garden where people can walk and play.
vocabularies.example:
Play in the park.
A big park.
Go to the park.
quizzes: I like to play with my friends in the big green __________! We can run on the grass today.
Look at that big __________! It has many tall trees and a small pond with colorful ducks.
Let's go to the __________! We can sit on the wooden bench and eat our sweet red apples.

vocabularies.definition: A road in a city or town with buildings along it.
vocabularies.example:
Walk on the street.
A busy street.
Cross the street.
quizzes: Please walk on the sidewalk and not on the __________! Many cars are going fast today tonight.
This is a very busy __________! There are many shops and many people walking around today.
We must cross the __________ carefully! Look left and right and hold your mother's hand.

vocabularies.definition: An area of sand next to the sea.
vocabularies.example:
Go to the beach.
Swim at the beach.
A beautiful beach.
quizzes: Let's go to the __________! We can play with the yellow sand and see the blue sea tonight.
I like to swim at the __________! The water is very cool and the sun is very bright today.
This is a beautiful __________! We can find many small seashells and make a big sandcastle.

vocabularies.definition: A place where wild animals are kept so people can look at them.
vocabularies.example:
Visit the zoo.
Watch animals at the zoo.
A big zoo.
quizzes: Let's visit the __________! We can see the tall giraffes and the big orange tigers today.
I like to watch the animals at the __________! The monkeys are very funny and they like bananas.
This is a very big __________! It has many different animals from all over the world tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A building where you buy things.
vocabularies.example:
Go to the shop.
A toy shop.
Buy things at the shop.
quizzes: I want to go to the __________ to buy a new book! It is near the big market in the city.
Look at that toy __________! It has many colorful dolls and fast cars in the window tonight.
Let's buy some things at the __________! We need some milk and some sweet bread for breakfast.

vocabularies.definition: A place where people buy and sell food and other things.
vocabularies.example:
Go to the market.
Buy fruit at the market.
A busy market.
quizzes: I like to go to the __________ with my grandmother! We buy fresh fish and green vegetables.
Please buy some fruit at the __________! I want some yellow bananas and some red apples today.
This is a very busy __________! There are many people selling many good things to eat tonight.

vocabularies.definition: A place where sick people are treated by doctors.
vocabularies.example:
Doctors work in the hospital.
A big hospital.
Go to the hospital.
quizzes: Many kind doctors work in the big __________! They help the sick people to feel better today.
This is a very big __________! It has many white beds and many busy nurses in blue clothes.
We must go to the __________! My little sister has a high fever and she needs to see a doctor.

vocabularies.definition: A large and important town.
vocabularies.example:
Live in the city.
A big city.
Many cars in the city.
quizzes: I live in a big __________! There are many tall buildings and many busy streets today tonight.
This is a very big __________! It has many parks and many shops and it is very noisy tonight.
There are many cars in the __________! They move fast and they make a lot of noise today.

vocabularies.definition: The land outside of towns and cities.
vocabularies.example:
Live in the countryside.
A quiet countryside.
Green fields in the countryside.
quizzes: I like to live in the __________! It is very quiet and I can see many cows and sheep today.
This is a very quiet __________! There are no busy streets and no loud cars around here today.
Look at the green fields in the __________! They are very big and they have many pretty flowers.

grammars.description: Hỏi ai đó đang đi đâu.
grammars.example:
Where are you going? 
I am going to the park.

vocabularies.definition: Large in size.
vocabularies.example:
A big elephant.
A big house.
My dog is big.
quizzes: Look at that __________ elephant! It has a very long nose and two very large ears tonight.
I live in a __________ house with my family! It has many rooms and a very large garden today.
My dog is very __________! It is as tall as I am and it has a very long tail today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: Little in size.
vocabularies.example:
A small mouse.
A small cat.
My toy is small.
quizzes: Look at that __________ mouse! It is very little and it is eating a piece of yellow cheese.
I have a __________ cat at home! It is very cute and it likes to sleep in a little basket.
My favorite toy is __________! I can put it in my pocket and take it to school every day tonight.

vocabularies.definition: Feeling pleased or glad.
vocabularies.example:
A happy face.
I am happy.
A happy boy.
quizzes: Look at her __________ face! She is smiling because she has a new colorful doll today tonight.
I am very __________ today! I played in the park with my friends and ate some sweet cake.
This is a very __________ boy! He is singing a song and jumping up and down in the garden.

vocabularies.definition: Feeling unhappy.
vocabularies.example:
A sad face.
I am sad.
Don't be sad.
quizzes: Why do you have a __________ face? Did you lose your favorite toy or your colorful ball today?
I am very __________ tonight because I cannot go to the park. It is raining outside today.
Please don't be __________! We can play a fun game inside the house and eat some sweet cookies.

vocabularies.definition: Having a high temperature.
vocabularies.example:
Hot weather.
Hot tea.
I am hot.
quizzes: It is very __________ weather today! I want to eat a cold ice cream and drink some water.
Be careful with that __________ tea! It is in the white cup and it can burn your mouth tonight.
I am very __________ after running in the garden! I need to sit under the big tree and rest.

vocabularies.definition: Having a low temperature.
vocabularies.example:
Cold water.
Cold weather.
I am cold.
quizzes: I like to drink __________ water in the summer! It makes me feel very fresh and very good.
It is very __________ weather today! Please wear your warm coat and your soft woolly hat.
I am very __________ tonight! Can I have a warm blanket and a cup of hot milk before I sleep?

vocabularies.definition: Measuring a large distance from end to end.
vocabularies.example:
A long snake.
Long hair.
A long pencil.
quizzes: Look at that __________ snake! It is very green and it is moving through the tall grass today.
My sister has __________ hair! It is black and she likes to wear a pretty pink ribbon today.
I have a __________ pencil in my bag! It is yellow and I use it to draw many big pictures.

vocabularies.definition: Not long, or not tall.
vocabularies.example:
A short pencil.
A short boy.
Short hair.
quizzes: This is a __________ pencil! I need to use it to write some small words in my new book today.
He is a __________ boy! He is not very tall but he can run very fast in the green park today.
I have __________ hair! It is easy to wash and it stays very clean when I play outside tonight.

vocabularies.definition: Not old; made recently.
vocabularies.example:
A new toy.
A new car.
I have new shoes.
quizzes: I have a __________ toy in my box today! It is very shiny and it has no scratches.
Look at that __________ car! It is very clean and it has a very bright red color tonight.
I have __________ shoes for school today! They are very black and they feel very good on my feet.

vocabularies.definition: Having existed for a long time.
vocabularies.example:
An old book.
An old man.
My shoes are old.
quizzes: I have an __________ book from my grandfather! The pages are yellow but the story is very good.
That __________ man is walking slowly in the park! He has white hair and a kind smile today.
My shoes are __________ now! They have some small holes and they are not very black tonight.

vocabularies.definition: Of a high quality or pleasant.
vocabularies.example:
A good boy.
A good book.
You are good.
quizzes: You are a __________ boy! You helped your mother to clean the big wooden table today tonight.
This is a very __________ book! It has many colorful pictures and a very happy ending today.
You are __________ at drawing! Your picture of the green cat is very beautiful tonight today.

vocabularies.definition: Not good; unpleasant.
vocabularies.example:
A bad dream.
A bad boy.
That is bad.
quizzes: I had a __________ dream last night! I saw a big scary monster under my bed today tonight.
Don't be a __________ boy! Please listen to your teacher and don't throw stones in the garden.
That is __________! You must not hit your friends when you play with the colorful toys today.

vocabularies.definition: Not dirty.
vocabularies.example:
Clean hands.
A clean room.
I am clean.
quizzes: Please wash your hands so they are __________! We are going to eat some sweet cake now tonight.
I have a __________ room today! I put all my toys in the box and my clothes in the cupboard.
I am __________ now! I had a warm bath and I am wearing my new white t-shirt today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: Not clean.
vocabularies.example:
Dirty hands.
A dirty face.
My shoes are dirty.
quizzes: Oh no! You have __________ hands from playing in the garden! Please wash them with soap today.
Look at your __________ face! You have some chocolate on your nose and your chin tonight.
My shoes are __________ after running in the rain! I must clean them with a wet cloth today.

grammars.description: Dùng tính từ để miêu tả.
grammars.example:
The elephant is big.
The mouse is small.

vocabularies.definition: To move on your legs at a regular speed.
vocabularies.example:
Walk to school.
I can walk.
Let's walk.
quizzes: I like to __________ to school with my mother! We see many colorful cars on the street today.
I can __________ very well now! I am a big boy and I don't need a small stroller tonight.
Let's __________ to the big park! It is a very sunny day and we can see the green trees today.

vocabularies.definition: To rest on your bottom with your body upright.
vocabularies.example:
Sit down.
Sit on the chair.
I am sitting.
quizzes: Please __________ down on the soft rug! It is time for a story about the funny monkeys today.
You can __________ on the small wooden chair! It is next to the big table in the kitchen tonight.
I am __________ on the sofa with my father! We are watching a movie about a big blue robot.

vocabularies.definition: To be on your feet in an upright position.
vocabularies.example:
Stand up.
Stand on the floor.
I am standing.
quizzes: Please __________ up when the teacher comes into the room! It is a very good thing to do today.
I can __________ on the floor on one leg! Look at me, I am like a big pink flamingo today tonight.
I am __________ near the door! I am waiting for my father to come home from work tonight today.

vocabularies.definition: To use your eyes to see.
vocabularies.example:
Look at the bird.
Look at me.
Look out the window.
quizzes: Please __________ at the small blue bird! It is singing a sweet song on the tall tree today.
__________ at me! I am wearing my new red hat and my shiny black shoes today tonight.
I like to __________ out the window! I can see the clouds and the birds in the bright sky today.

vocabularies.definition: To give attention to a sound.
vocabularies.example:
Listen to the music.
Listen to the teacher.
I am listening.
quizzes: Please __________ to the happy music! It makes me want to dance and jump in the room tonight.
You must __________ to the teacher! She is telling us about the animals in the wild zoo today.
I am __________ to the rain on the window! It makes a funny sound like patter-patter tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To say words with your voice.
vocabularies.example:
Speak English.
Speak slowly.
I can speak.
quizzes: I like to __________ English with my friends at school! We can say many fun words today tonight.
Please __________ slowly! I want to understand what you are saying about the big red truck today.
I can __________ two languages! I speak Vietnamese with my mother and English with my teacher.

vocabularies.definition: To look at and understand words.
vocabularies.example:
Read a book.
I can read.
I am reading.
quizzes: I like to __________ a book about the fast cars! It has many colorful pictures and long stories.
I can __________ many small words! My teacher helps me to learn new things every day today.
I am __________ a story to my little sister! She likes the one about the cute brown teddy bear.

vocabularies.definition: To make letters or words with a pen or pencil.
vocabularies.example:
Write your name.
Write in the notebook.
I am writing.
quizzes: Please __________ your name on the top of the paper! Use your new yellow pencil today tonight.
I like to __________ in my new notebook! I write about my family and my favorite small pets today.
I am __________ a letter to my grandmother! I want to tell her about my new red bicycle tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To use a crayon or paint to add color to a picture.
vocabularies.example:
Color the picture.
I like coloring.
Use red to color.
quizzes: I like to __________ the picture of the big yellow house! I use my colorful crayons today.
I like __________ very much! I can make the sky blue and the grass green in my book tonight.
Please use red to __________ the small apple! It looks very sweet and very pretty today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To make a picture with a pencil or pen.
vocabularies.example:
Draw a dog.
I can draw.
I am drawing.
quizzes: I like to __________ a small brown dog! It has a long tail and two big black eyes today.
I can __________ a beautiful flower for my mother! I use my pencil and a clean white paper.
I am __________ a big silver plane now! It has two wings and it can fly high in the air today.

vocabularies.definition: To show something by holding out your finger towards it.
vocabularies.example:
Point to the board.
Point to your nose.
Don't point.
quizzes: Please __________ to the white board! The teacher is writing some fun words for us to read.
Can you __________ to your small nose? It is between your two eyes and above your mouth today.
Don't __________ at people! It is better to use your words to say what you want today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To move your hand from side to side to say hello or goodbye.
vocabularies.example:
Wave goodbye.
Wave your hand.
I am waving.
quizzes: Please __________ goodbye to your grandmother! She is going home in her big red car today.
__________ your hand to say hello to your friends! They are playing in the green garden tonight.
I am __________ to the people on the big ship! They are far away on the blue sea today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To move something to a particular place.
vocabularies.example:
Put it on the table.
Put your bag down.
Put on your shoes.
quizzes: Please __________ the red apple on the wooden table! We can eat it after we play our game.
__________ your blue bag down on the floor! It is very heavy and you need to rest your arms.
Put __________ your black shoes! We are going to walk to the park and see the colorful ducks.

vocabularies.definition: To let someone have something as a gift.
vocabularies.example:
Give me the book.
Give it to me.
I give you an apple.
quizzes: Please __________ me the story book! I want to read about the funny monkeys in the wild zoo.
__________ it to me! I want to look at the beautiful picture you drew with your pencils today.
I __________ you a sweet red apple! You can eat it for your snack at school today tonight.

vocabularies.definition: To move something away from a place.
vocabularies.example:
Take a pencil.
Take it.
Don't take my toy.
quizzes: Please __________ a yellow pencil from the box! You can use it to write your name on the paper.
__________ it with your hand! It is very small and light and you can carry it in your pocket.
Don't __________ my favorite toy! I am playing with it now and I want to keep it in my hand.

grammars.description: Câu mệnh lệnh.
grammars.example:
Sit down!
Stand up!
Open your book!
